rows.label: qev060204_MSG0001
rows.name:
Heehee...! Metaphorically speaking, I am a god!
Now is the time to purify these filthy, clockwork
lives with this holy Voltant![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0002
rows.name:
Come on, do it! Me!
Throw this into the reservoir!
...Hey, don't chicken out! Do it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_JNK0010
rows.name: Stop

rows.label: qev060204_SEL0011
rows.name: Immediately step in to stop him.

rows.label: qev060204_JNK0020
rows.name: Watch

rows.label: qev060204_SEL0021
rows.name: Observe the situation for a while.

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Whatever.
I can do it whenever I want.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0004
rows.name:
I'll take care of them at my own pace after I grab some grub.
Haha... That's right, I'm a god.
There's absolutely no need to rush...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0005
rows.name:
Eek... Eeeeek!!
Why is someone in a place like this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0006
rows.name:
No... I see.
You managed to find this place from the statement.
Seems there was at least one BLADE with a working brain![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0007
rows.name:
But, this is perfect timing.
Metaphorically speaking, this is a show I'm putting on...
And it's no fun without an audience after all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0008
rows.name:
Now... I'm going to throw it!
All you fakes who drink this water!
Writhe in agony and fall straight to hell![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_JNK0030
rows.name: Restrain

rows.label: qev060204_SEL0031
rows.name: Stop him with a strong tone.

rows.label: qev060204_JNK0040
rows.name: Calm

rows.label: qev060204_SEL0041
rows.name: Focus on calming him down first.

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0009
rows.name:
Idiot!
There's no way I can stop now, is there!?
I've come all the way out here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0010
rows.name:
For example, if your life was over unless you jumped
off a cliff... You'd jump in that situation, wouldn't you?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0011
rows.name:
Now that I've made it this far...
All that's left is to throw this holy Voltant in![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0012
rows.name:
I'm going to do it!
I have to do it!
I have no choice but to do it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0013
rows.name:
I'm going to do it! I'm going to do it! I'm going to do it!
I'm going to do ittttttttttttttt!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0014
rows.name:
Hmph... You're a lot more reasonable
than I thought.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0015
rows.name:
...Alright, I'll let you listen to my
grand philosophy one last time, yeah?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0016
rows.name:
You see...
I absolutely cannot forgive this B.B. body.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0017
rows.name:
If you throw away your God-given body,
you are no longer human.
Metaphorically speaking, you're nothing but a doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0018
rows.name:
Don't you think so too?
Just existing like this makes us sinful beings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_JNK0050
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev060204_SEL0051
rows.name: Agree with Homer's opinion.

rows.label: qev060204_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev060204_SEL0061
rows.name: Deny Homer's opinion.

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0019
rows.name: I see... I knew it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0020
rows.name:
I knew I wasn't wrong!
Thank you!
I've made up my mind to pass judgment on them!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0021
rows.name:
I'm going to do it!
I have to do it!
I have no choice but to do it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0022
rows.name:
I'm going to do it! I'm going to do it! I'm going to do it!
I'm going to do ittttttttttttttt!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0023
rows.name: Ugh... How can you be so confident?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0024
rows.name:
Your body is made of the same materials
as some random robot out there,
so how can you possibly think you're human...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0025
rows.name:
I'm terrified every single day...
Yet everyone around me acts like it's completely normal.
That... pisses me off![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0026
rows.name:
What the hell is a soul!? There's no such thing!
Without a proper physical body,
you can't prove you're human![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0027
rows.name:
No matter how much those fakes struggle,
there's no way they can ever be real humans!
Hey! Let's just give up on everything![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0028
rows.name:
Let's use this Voltant to put everyone at ease!
No... I'll put them at ease myself!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_JNK0070
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev060204_SEL0071
rows.name: Agree with Homer's opinion.

rows.label: qev060204_JNK0080
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev060204_SEL0081
rows.name: Deny Homer's opinion.

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0029
rows.name: ...Eh? Why aren't you stopping me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0030
rows.name:
Are you saying you understand how I feel?
Are you saying you've suffered the same way?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0031
rows.name:
...No, it's not just you.
You're saying everyone is actually terrified... and they're
just working hard to manage that fear?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0032
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0033
rows.name:
I knew you would try to stop me!
You're the type of human who feels
absolutely nothing at all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0034
rows.name:
Damn it! I'm going to do it!
I have to do it!
I have no choice but to do it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0035
rows.name:
I'm going to do it! I'm going to do it! I'm going to do it!
I'm going to do ittttttttttttttt!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_JNK0090
rows.name: Persuade

rows.label: qev060204_SEL0091
rows.name: Persuade Homer relentlessly.

rows.label: qev060204_JNK0100
rows.name: Silence

rows.label: qev060204_SEL0101
rows.name: Stay silent and let Homer think.

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0036
rows.name:
...Ugh!! I...!
I don't even know what's what anymore...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0037
rows.name: So... I'll just end it all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0038
rows.name:
I'm going to do it!
I have to do it!
I have no choice but to do it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0039
rows.name:
I'm going to do it! I'm going to do it! I'm going to do it!
I'm going to do ittttttttttttttt!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0040
rows.name:
...I see.
Metaphorically speaking, I was just a cowardly dog,
barking pathetically without end...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0041
rows.name:
Pretending to be a god...
Just trying to erase the anxieties of my weak self...
Just envying the strength of the people around me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0042
rows.name:
...And so I stole this stuff,
sent a warning... but was too scared
to actually throw it into the lake...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0043
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0044
rows.name:
I'm glad I realized this
before I threw this thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0045
rows.name:
Metaphorically speaking, you are a ray of light...
The brilliance of your soul woke me up
while I was lost in the dark.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0046
rows.name:
I'm... going to turn myself in...
I'll return this to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0047
rows.name:
Hahahaha!
Die, die, dieeeeeeeeeee!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0048
rows.name:
Metaphorically speaking!
Die like dominos falling one after anotherrrrrrrrr!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0049
rows.name:
Hm...? 
Why is Voltant filling the air?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0050
rows.name:
...Well, my soul is starting to itch a little,
so perhaps I should do a quick revoltant
before I fall into a deep sleep.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0051
rows.name:
Phew! I am satisfied!
Metaphorically speaking, my stomach is completely full.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0052
rows.name:
...Huh?
Why is [ST:playername ]
in a place like this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_JNK0110
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev060204_SEL0111
rows.name: Say you were persuading the culprit.

rows.label: qev060204_JNK0120
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev060204_SEL0121
rows.name: Ask why Hoskeran is here.

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0053
rows.name: Ah, I see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0054
rows.name:
Well, that person is also my master
of "metaphors".
Please treat him with respect.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0055
rows.name:
Horonalderon was being noisy,
so I came all the way out here to get some sleep.
Please keep this a secret.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0056
rows.name: Yes, well then, if you'll excuse me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0057
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0058
rows.name:
Um... Are you telling me everything was just
turned upside down by that stupid Zaruboggan
who handed over the Voltant without a fight?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060204_MSG0059
rows.name:
I... kind of feel like everything is empty now...
I don't care anymore...
I'll just head back to NLA and turn myself in...[ST:wait ]
